DOES 1-X 675 26TH AVE UPPER UNIT SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Eward Nagy, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Janet Woo Chow and Shirley Woo, all present in court.
Defendant: William Castello, present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant shall vacate the subject property located at 675 26th Ave., Upper unit, San Francisco, no later then 11:59 P.M. of Oct. 31, 2007.
Return all keys by noon of Nov. 1, 2007, any property left after vacate will be disposed without notice.
Defendant can remain in possession only if the rent payments are being made as follows: $1,000.00 on or before July, 12th; $1,450.00 on or before Aug. 6th; &1,450.00 on or before Sept. 5th; and $1,450.00 on or before Oct. 5th, 2007.
Payment shall be in form of certified funds and received by the Plaintiffs no later then the due dates indicated.
Defendant waived all claims and deposit.
If Defendant complied, matter to be dismissed with prejudice, plaintiffs waived all back rents.
If failed, Plaintiffs will give 24 hrs. notice by telephone, file a declaration with Ex Parte application for entry of Judgment for restitution and possession, rents of $10,150.00, attorney's fees $3,500.00, costs $375.00, and no stay of execution.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerks K. Shaw/M. Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Janet Woo Chow is present.
Marc Seidenfeld representing the plaintiff.

Defendant William Costello is present.
Lisa T. Bellard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.
